form.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a 5 length win at this track over 530m in 30.58. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Not going well enough to figure in this.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (30.72) over 530m at this track. Has a squeeze box to navigate but is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Gawler (31.02) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when second (30.70) at big odds over 530m at this track. Wide draw here. Worth including.
